title: Skyworks Reports Q2 FY22 Results
text: IRVINE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS), an innovator of high-performance analog semiconductors connecting people, places and things, today reported second fiscal quarter results for the period ended April 1, 2022. Revenue for the second fiscal quarter of 2022 was $1.336 billion, up 14% year over year, exceeding consensus estimates.
